summary: User is building a website (likely tourism/landing page for Querétaro) and wants a hero section with a full-background image of Arcos de Querétaro. Repeated deployment errors and draft expiration issues have been occurring.
known_issues: Repeated deployment errors and draft app expiration issues are blocking progress
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Full-width panoramic photograph of the Arcos de Querétaro aqueduct landmark, warm golden-hour lighting, stone arches in the foreground, colonial city backdrop (arcos-queretaro-hero.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Update the HeroSection component to use the newly generated Arcos de Querétaro image as the full-background hero image, replacing any existing placeholder or previous hero background.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add full-background hero image (Arcos de Querétaro photo) to the site
